reasoning: The active SRS target covers AI TUI recovery options, restart/orphan recovery, metadata, and security concerns.
The BuilderGate stability work covers terminal resource caps, browser input backpressure, output scheduling, snapshot budgets, runtime residency, and split WebSocket transport.
Adding BGSTAB requirements to the active AITUI target would mix unrelated product scopes.
recommendation: Create or confirm a dedicated BuilderGate Stability target/scope before live SpecKiwi mutation.
